profile.name: GLOBAL X LITHIUM & BATTERY T
profile.description: Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF is a passively managed exchange-traded fund that tracks the Solactive Global Lithium Index, providing broad exposure to the global lithium industry. The fund invests in a market-cap-weighted portfolio of 20-40 companies engaged in lithium mining, exploration, and battery production, capturing the complete lithium value chain from raw material extraction through refining, chemical processing, and advanced battery cell manufacturing. This comprehensive approach enables investors to gain diversified exposure across multiple segments of the lithium sector while reducing the volatility associated with individual company investments. The ETF maintains a 0.75% expense ratio and distributes qualified dividends to shareholders. LIT's portfolio spans multiple sectors including materials, industrials, and information technology, reflecting the broad applications of lithium in electric vehicles, energy storage systems, grid infrastructure, and consumer electronics. The fund's annual index reconstitution and rebalancing help maintain its alignment with evolving market dynamics in the lithium and battery technology space. Founded in July 2010, Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF serves investors seeking targeted exposure to the essential materials driving the global energy transition and electrification trends.
